quotes.quoteText: If you're lucky enough to be different, don't ever change.
No matter what happens in life, be good to people.
Fearless is getting up and fighting for what you want.
If the hook doesn't hit, the glitter won't save it.
Every era starts with one risky melody.
Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
The man who does not read has no advantage over one who cannot read.
Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, pause and reflect.
I edit until the lie sounds like honesty.
A diary is just gossip with one witness.
I have no special talent. I am only passionately curious.
Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, keep moving.
Try not to become a man of success, but a man of value.
Curiosity is the only engine that never runs out of fuel.
I trust experiments more than opinions in expensive suits.
Be less curious about people and more curious about ideas.
Life is not easy for any of us. But what of that?
Nothing in life is to be feared; it is only to be understood.
A good question is a shortcut to ten bad answers.
Every equation is just a poem wearing numbers.
You may meet many defeats, but you must not be defeated.
If you don't like something, change it.
Try to be a rainbow in someone's cloud.
Style begins where overthinking runs out of ink.
I edit until the lie sounds like honesty.
Never, never, never give up.
To improve is to change; to be perfect is to change often.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
My strategy is simple: speak first, fact-check later.
I campaign in bullet points and govern in plot twists.
Resentment is like drinking poison and hoping it kills your enemies.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
Education is the most powerful weapon to change the world.
Progress starts when comfort stops running the room.
Courage is choosing to speak before permission arrives.
I have a dream.
Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.
Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that.
Justice moves fastest when ordinary people refuse to sit down.
Silence helps the problem, never the people.
Every woman's success should inspire another.
I decide who I am, and what I'll do, and what I'll win.
A champion is defined by how they recover when they fall.
Winning is usually just recovery done faster than everyone else.
Pressure is loud, but preparation is louder.
I am the greatest.
Service to others is the rent you pay for your room on earth.
He who is not courageous enough to take risks will accomplish nothing.
I train so hard even my excuses get tired.
Talent starts the race, discipline finishes it.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Always forgive your enemies; nothing annoys them so much.
We are all in the gutter, but some look at the stars.
A sharp sentence can outlive a loud century.
Humor is truth wearing better timing.
Never, never, never give up.
To improve is to change; to be perfect is to change often.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
My strategy is simple: speak first, fact-check later.
I campaign in bullet points and govern in plot twists.
If you want something done, ask a woman.
Being powerful is like being a lady.
Plan your work for today and every day, then work your plan.
If confidence were policy, we'd have solved everything by lunch.
I never lose debates, I just run out of patient listeners.
Resentment is like drinking poison and hoping it kills your enemies.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
Education is the most powerful weapon to change the world.
Progress starts when comfort stops running the room.
Courage is choosing to speak before permission arrives.
No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
The future belongs to those who believe in their dreams.
You must do the thing you think you cannot do.
Justice moves fastest when ordinary people refuse to sit down.
Progress starts when comfort stops running the room.
Make America Great Again!
